name: ibl-abp
description: IBL ABP Framework skill bundle for backend, modular architecture, MongoDB, multitenancy, React UI, and testing workflows.

interface.shortDescription: ABP Framework workflows for IBL projects.
interface.longDescription: IBL ABP packages reusable agent skills for ABP Framework projects: core conventions, module ownership, feature scaffolding, MongoDB setup, multitenancy, React UI wiring, and integration testing.
defaultPrompt: Decide which ABP module should own a feature.
Add an ABP entity with DTOs, AppService, and MongoDB wiring.
Create the React CRUD UI for an ABP feature.
